attacking_style: Launches tactical attacks on penultimate climbs or entering finishing circuits, typically from already-established breakaway groups. Uses climbing power to initiate moves, then transitions to sustained solo efforts in final 5-10km.
team_tactics: Operates primarily as breakaway specialist with minimal visible team support. Self-reliant positioning, reads group dynamics to time attacks when chase coordination breaks down.
terrain_preference: Undulating finishes with late climbs (penultimate climb ideal) followed by solo run-ins. Excels on courses requiring 6+ hour breakaway endurance combined with late climbing power. Struggles on explosive summit finishes with short, steep gradients.
vulnerability: Cannot respond to sharp late-race accelerations inside final 2km after committing to initial attack. Vulnerable when opponents counter on steep gradients rather than match tempo.
key_patterns: Attacks from breakaways rather than peloton, leveraging pre-established advantage (3 observations)
Initiates move on penultimate or circuit climbs, not final ascent (2 observations)
Excels at reading tactical deadlock in chase groups to time attacks (2 observations)
Strong at managing 30-60 second solo efforts after multi-hour breakaway exertion (2 observations)
Weakness: cannot sustain when countered with explosive accelerations inside 2km (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2022 win showed maintained tactical acumen and climbing power, but no recent observations to confirm current trajectory beyond that season
